units.title: Getting Started
units.description: Set up your kit, hold your sticks, and play your first beat

units.title: Reading Drum Notation
units.description: Understand note values, time signatures, and drum charts

units.title: Drum Rudiments
units.description: Master the alphabet of drumming — strokes, rolls, and paradiddles

units.title: Rock, Metal & Punk
units.description: Play the beats that define rock music across its heaviest sub-genres

units.title: 4-Limb Independence
units.description: Train each limb to work independently for more creative drumming

units.title: Groove Styles
units.description: Funk, jazz, reggae, and Latin — expand your rhythmic vocabulary

units.title: Advanced Technique
units.description: Moeller method, ghost notes, and expressive dynamics

units.title: Odd Time Signatures
units.description: Explore 3/4, 6/8, 5/4, and 7/8 — the rhythms beyond 4/4

units.title: Fills & Soloing
units.description: Build a fill vocabulary and learn to solo musically

units.title: The Complete Drummer
units.description: Build a practice routine and go anywhere on the drums

units.title: Jazz Drumming
units.description: Jazz ride patterns, swing feel, brushes, trading fours, and jazz comping

units.title: Latin Percussion
units.description: Son clave, bossa nova, samba, and Afro-Cuban 6/8 — the rhythmic foundations of Latin music

units.title: Metal Drumming
units.description: Double bass, blast beats, metal grooves, and thrash rhythms

units.title: Hand Technique
units.description: Moeller technique, finger control, rebound, stick heights, and wrist vs. fingers

units.title: Brushwork
units.description: Brush sweeps, press rolls, jazz brushwork patterns, and ballad feel

units.title: Funk Mastery
units.description: Ghost notes, 16th note funk, New Orleans second line, and syncopated kick patterns

units.title: Polyrhythms
units.description: 3 against 2, 4 against 3, metric modulation, and superimposed meters

units.title: Afro-Cuban Deep Dive
units.description: Batá rhythms, mozambique, cascara, and guaguancó

units.title: Double Bass Mastery
units.description: Speed building, coordination, bass drum independence, and heel-toe technique

units.title: Studio Drumming
units.description: Click track playing, reading charts, dynamic control, and session mindset

units.title: Advanced Jazz
units.description: Free jazz concepts, odd-time jazz, playing inside/outside, and avant-garde drumming

units.title: World Rhythms
units.description: Indian rhythms (tal), Balkan meter, Middle Eastern grooves, and West African patterns

units.title: Electronic & Hybrid Drumming
units.description: Combining acoustic with electronics, triggering samples, hybrid setups, and looping

units.title: Composition & Arrangement
units.description: Writing drum parts, reading scores, arrangement for different genres, and producing drum tracks

units.title: Master Drummer
units.description: Synthesis of all paths — finding your voice, performance preparation, and artistic expression
